interpretation_scope.occlusion: AA identity, functional group, deterministic residue descriptors, and the ESM2 vector are masked at one position; geometry and global descriptors remain frozen.
interpretation_scope.integrated_gradients: Attribution of the ESM2 input pathway relative to a repeated within-peptide mean ESM2 vector by default; other inputs remain frozen.
interpretation_scope.attention_and_gate: Model-use diagnostics, not causal residue importance.
interpretation_scope.mutation_scan: Mutant AA descriptors and ESM2 representations are regenerated, but ESMFold geometry is kept fixed; results require structural or experimental validation.
